response: convert The art collection tax is two million times twenty percent minus five percent discount yielding three hundred eighty thousand dollars. convert The securities portfolio tax is three million minus one hundred thousand deduction times fifteen percent resulting in four hundred thirty five thousand dollars. convert The real estate portfolio originally valued at five million incurs taxes of one hundred thousand plus three hundred thousand plus six hundred thousand totaling one million dollars. convert The initial total estate tax liability sums to one million eight hundred fifteen thousand dollars before correction. convert The real estate value increases by ten percent to five point five million requiring recalculation of the progressive tax. convert The new real estate tax applies ten percent to the first million fifteen percent to the next two million and twenty percent to the remaining two point five million totaling one point five million dollars. convert The corrected total estate tax liability becomes two point three one five million dollars after adjusting for the valuation error.
